---
title: "Welcome"
description: "Course notes and writing by Professor Lastname."
listing:
  - id: listing-home
    contents: notes
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 5
    fields: [title, description, date]
---

Welcome to my website. This is the home page.

To read my notes, click **Notes** in the menu at the top, or pick one below.

Everything here is written in plain text files that end in `.qmd`. To change
this page, open `index.qmd` and edit the words. To add a new note, see the
[Notes](notes/index.qmd) page.

## Recent Notes

The list below fills in automatically from the `notes/` folder.

::: {#listing-home}
:::
